overview: The strongest supportive currents come through Guru and Shani. Pressure points are tied to Rahu and need measured handling.
yearlyTheme: The Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram (March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027), a year where Midhuna Rasi (Gemini) natives will enjoy predominantly favorable results due to the transit of Jupiter. From the beginning of the year until October 31, 2026, Jupiter’s benevolent influence will bring significant fame and reputation, while those aspiring for children may be blessed with a healthy and handsome son to carry forward the family lineage. Your philanthropic nature will earn you a unique standing in society, particularly during June, July, and August, which stand out as peak months for health, fortune, and the successful accumulation of long-awaited savings. Marriage efforts are highly likely to succeed during this period, bringing a partner from a family of high values; however, these positive effects may be reversed for individuals whose personal horoscopes feature a weak or antagonistic Jupiter. A challenging phase occurs from November 1, 2026, to January 23, 2027, where laziness or pretentious behavior could lead to setbacks, and health concerns like liver issues or high cholesterol may arise, requiring extra caution for those with lifestyle addictions. Fortunately, from January 24, 2027, until the end of the Telugu year, Jupiter returns to a favorable position, restoring positive momentum and ensuring that your financial goals and desired benefits are successfully realized

blessing: The Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram, where Midhuna Rasi (Gemini) natives will encounter mixed results due to the influence of Kethu. Until December 4, 2026, Kethu will provide highly favorable outcomes, particularly in land-related matters and real estate, allowing you to successfully accumulate wealth and assets.

planetaryInfluences.summary: The Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram (March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027), a year where Midhuna Rasi (Gemini) natives will enjoy predominantly favorable results due to the transit of Jupiter. From the beginning of the year until October 31, 2026, Jupiter’s benevolent influence will bring significant fame and reputation, while those aspiring for children may be blessed with a healthy and handsome son to carry forward the family lineage. Your philanthropic nature will earn you a unique standing in society, particularly during June, July, and August, which stand out as peak months for health, fortune, and the successful accumulation of long-awaited savings. This year marks the beginning of a highly auspicious period for Midhuna Rasi (Gemini) natives, as the transit of Saturn (Shani) throughout the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram will yield consistently favorable results. During this year, long-held aspirations of owning a home are likely to be fulfilled, while those in the political sphere can expect to secure significant leadership positions as desired. You will enjoy an improved standard of living and witness a notable rise in your social status and reputation. A newfound interest in spiritual, mantra, and tantra-related subjects will emerge; specifically, individuals with strong Mercury (Budha) and Sun (Ravi) placements in their personal horoscopes will have the opportunity to gain profound knowledge in the field of astrology. Students will develop a clear vision for their future and gain the creative imagination necessary to excel in their respective fields. For those who possess a favorable Saturn in their personal birth charts, divine interventions will consistently bring satisfaction and success. Most importantly, Midhuna Rasi natives are completely free from the influence of Elinati Shani (Sade Sati) during this Sree Parabhava Naama year.

The Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram, where Midhuna Rasi (Gemini) natives will experience moderate favorability from Rahu until December 4, 2026, followed by a period of severe adversity starting December 5, 2026, through the end of the year. During this later phase, there is a risk of being drawn toward improper actions, facing numerous complications in all undertaken tasks, financial losses, and harassment from enemies. Extra caution is advised regarding snakes or other venomous insects, and one should strictly avoid gambling as it will lead to significant losses and general instability in life. This negative influence of Rahu may also cause the loss of good friends; those with a weak Rahu or Kala Sarpa Dosha in their personal horoscopes will feel these negative effects most intensely. To mitigate these challenges throughout the Sree Parabhava year, it is recommended to daily chant the mantra,

monthlyHighlights.summary: March 2026 brings a period where obstacles in your tasks will gradually diminish, though your financial income is expected to remain average. Efforts toward securing new employment or moving to a permanent residence will be successful during this month, signaling a positive shift in your living situation. You should be cautious during the third week, specifically on the 13th, 14th, and 15th, as disputes related to vehicles may cause some mental unrest. However, significant high-level opportunities will arise between the 18th and 21st, leading to a productive phase where you may acquire new items for your home by the month's end. Furthermore, you can expect favorable gains in real estate transactions and will enjoy a sense of comfort and support from your life partner throughout this period.

May 2026 brings a slightly favorable period for Midhuna Rasi, characterized by long-awaited positive transformations in your professional life, business ventures, and employment status. However, this progress in your career may be contrasted by some dissatisfaction in your domestic life, where conflicts with your spouse's relatives could lead to mental distress and unexpected criticism from those you consider your own. The period between the 14th and 23rd is particularly auspicious for launching new projects, and it is an excellent time to pursue efforts toward establishing a secondary source of income. For those seeking marriage, the final week of the month is likely to bring a very suitable alliance, though you should remain cautious on the 3rd, 4th, 9th, 13th, and 18th as these dates are unfavorable. While your overall financial income remains average this month, the professional growth and potential for new beginnings provide a constructive path forward.

June 2026 for Midhuna Rasi will be a month focused on resolving long-standing family issues, bringing a sense of relief to your domestic life. While your overall financial income is expected to be average, those born under the Arudra Nakshatra should be mindful as expenses may slightly exceed their initial estimates. Increased physical strain in your professional life could lead to minor health setbacks, so it is important to balance hard work with adequate rest. This month is particularly favorable for planning new home constructions or housing-related projects, and those seeking a change in employment will find success in their efforts during the very first week. Visiting Vaishnava pilgrimage sites is recommended, as it is likely to bring about a positive shift in your financial progress. During the second and third weeks, opportunities for business expansion will arise through your social circle and friends, while the final week promises to be highly beneficial for people of all walks of life. For individuals who have a favorable Jupiter in their personal birth charts, this month will be exceptionally profitable, allowing you to achieve significant success with only minimal effort.

July 2026 promises to be a month of significant growth for Midhuna Rasi, especially for those involved in real estate and land-related businesses, which are expected to yield substantial profits. You will see a noticeable increase in financial income and a welcome relief from long-standing health issues, providing you with the vitality needed to complete previously stalled tasks through your own efforts. Professional talent will finally receive the recognition it deserves, with those in specialized fields likely to receive awards or accolades. For women, this period is highly favorable for fixed asset transactions, and there are strong indications of gains in gold and the purchase of new household appliances. Politicians can look forward to attaining new positions and exercising responsible authority during this time. Employment efforts initiated between the 12th and 25th are slated for success, but on a personal level, you must be cautious of an excessive desire for affection and attention compared to others, as this tendency could become a source of emotional friction.

August 2026 for Midhuna Rasi will be a period of strong financial growth and positive outcomes in legal or court-related matters. While your professional life shows great promise with potential promotions and excellent cooperation from colleagues, women of this sign may experience frequent headaches or migraine-related issues that require attention. You will find yourself gaining a deeper understanding of new subjects and utilizing your time profitably to reach your specific financial goals. Personal life remains joyful, and by the end of the month, any lingering spine or back-related health concerns are likely to improve. Travel undertaken between the 10th and 18th will prove beneficial, and the final week holds the potential for significant financial gains for those in the business sector. However, please be cautious around the 23rd, 24th, and 25th, as these dates indicate potential health setbacks for paternal relatives.

September 2026 for Midhuna Rasi will see a steady but average financial income, though you should be prepared for unexpected expenses related to vehicle maintenance or repairs. This is an excellent month for those seeking to change their residence, as efforts toward moving to a new home will be successful, and you will find yourself gaining mental peace and joy as personal problems begin to resolve. Progress is indicated for those seeking employment in distant lands or foreign countries, while the business community can expect the desired profits and favorable conditions for expansion, including the acquisition of trustworthy partners. Your interest in social welfare and community involvement will grow, and those in the field of fine arts will find this period particularly rewarding, with many likely to receive awards or public recognition. For those planning to launch new initiatives or important tasks, the 1st, 4th, 16th, 18th, and 26th are the most auspicious dates to do so.

October 2026 presents a challenging period for Midhuna Rasi natives, where planetary alignments suggest that conditions may not be very favorable across business, employment, and educational sectors. You may face unexpected losses or sudden conflicts with individuals who lack refinement, making it essential to channel your full energy into your efforts and maintain persistence despite the obstacles that arise. The middle of the month could bring tension to the family environment due to disagreements with children, and the third week, in particular, indicates disappointing results that require you to pay extra attention to the well-being of your family members. It is advisable to postpone significant travels or meetings with influential people during this time and to be thorough in verifying the details of every matter you handle. Health-wise, you should be cautious regarding urinary tract issues, and it is important to note that the 17th, 18th, 25th, 26th, and 27th are particularly unfavorable dates this month.

November 2026 for Midhuna Rasi will see a continuation of the challenges faced in the previous month, with a noticeable dip in financial income and a sense of stagnation in your creative or strategic thinking. Luck may not favor your current endeavors, making this an unfavorable time to launch any new business ventures or important projects. It is especially critical for women, particularly those who are pregnant, to take extra precautions regarding their health and well-being during this period. The negative influence of Rahu will be quite strong throughout the month; to mitigate these effects, it is traditionally recommended to donate black gram (minumulu) to Brahmins on two Wednesdays during this month to seek planetary peace and balance.

December 2026 brings a welcome decrease in the intensity of your problems as Midhuna Rasi (Gemini) natives find their financial income returning to a normal, steady state. During this month, you will receive expected financial and verbal support from others, enabling you to successfully complete your goals and encounter encouraging events in your career path. The hurdles in your financial dealings will begin to clear, and business ventures will yield the desired returns, while the second and third weeks offer particularly promising days for those seeking employment. On a personal level, you may be required to make some tough decisions, necessitating control over any natural tendencies toward pride or ego. It is essential to avoid being overly blunt or harsh in your speech to prevent hurting the feelings of those around you; additionally, please keep in mind that the 10th, 18th, 20th, 29th, 30th, and 31st are not favorable dates this month.

January 2027 for Midhuna Rasi starts the year on a strong note with good financial income and favorable results in both professional and business sectors. You will achieve an unexpected and significant victory over your rivals, though you should be cautious as travel may lead to wasteful expenditures. Specifically, those born under the Punarvasu Nakshatra should take extra care regarding travel or, if possible, postpone long journeys altogether. Your ability to adapt your behavior to suit changing circumstances will prove to be a great asset, leading to positive outcomes and new contracts for those in service. While fixed assets will generate fresh sources of income, marriage alliances may face last-minute hurdles, making it essential to thoroughly verify astrological compatibility beforehand. For the unemployed, the month offers encouraging new opportunities, and following the Makara Sankranti festival, you can expect particularly good news regarding government jobs or a much-desired professional transfer.

February 2026 marks the period of preparation for these upcoming trends, where February 2027 for Midhuna Rasi will see a balance between income and expenditures. While those in the agricultural sector may face a difficult time with unfavorable pricing and potential losses, the window between the 6th and 12th of the month is highly auspicious for pursuing foreign opportunities, job changes, or promotions. Individuals born under the Mrigasira Nakshatra will see their importance grow within the family as long-standing misunderstandings are finally cleared, and despite rising expenses, you will be able to manage your financial needs effectively. After the 15th, any pending government-related tasks are likely to reach a successful conclusion, and those in the construction or contracting fields will find this month particularly profitable. Although you may experience some distance from your circle of friends, the month ends on a positive note with participation in auspicious spiritual or divine programs.
favorableDates: 6th and 12th of the month is highly auspicious for pursuing foreign

monthlyHighlights.summary: March 2027 brings a highly positive financial outlook for Midhuna Rasi (Gemini) natives. During this month, mental stress in your professional life will dissipate, and you will find that tasks are completed exactly as you envisioned. In your personal life, long-standing doubts will finally be cleared, and those in business will receive the necessary clearances or permissions from authorities, although some challenges may arise due to labor shortages. While those dependent on traditional or ancestral occupations may find their income to be average, your life partner will be particularly attentive to your needs and supportive of your goals. This is a very auspicious month for those aspiring for children, as good news is likely on the horizon; however, you must be extremely cautious as there is a high risk of losses through speculation or gambling. For individuals born under the Punarvasu Nakshatra, this month holds the special promise of fulfilling the long-held dream of owning your own home.

notes: OCR used page 1 of the local PDF capture.
Match status is based on heading, available metrics, available annual section markers, and first month marker.
